response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple roles, which aligns well with the required skills. His background in PostgreSQL, AWS services, and Kubernetes is strong, though his recent work leans heavily toward backend and AI-agent infrastructure. His open-source contributions and teaching experience suggest a collaborative and growth-oriented mindset, making him a strong candidate despite some experience gaps in direct renewable energy/construction tech.
strengths: Proven fullstack expertise with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple roles
Extensive experience with AWS services (CDK, RDS, S3, etc.), Docker, and Kubernetes
Strong background in scalable architectures, CI/CD, and collaborative development practices
concerns: Limited direct experience with PostgreSQL (primary requirement) compared to MongoDB
Recent roles skew heavily toward backend/AI-agent infrastructure, with less frontend focus
High seniority level (Staff/Senior roles) may indicate overqualification for an entry-level position
